problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Shape memory alloy phase transition may resolve How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
